question: Give me all the offices in usa
generated_sql: SELECT * FROM offices WHERE country = 'USA'
ground_truth_sql: SELECT * FROM offices WHERE country = 'USA';

question: Find all employees who work in the San Francisco office
generated_sql:
SELECT e.firstName, e.lastName
FROM employees e
JOIN offices o ON e.officeCode = o.officeCode
WHERE o.city = 'San Francisco'
ground_truth_sql: SELECT e.* FROM employees e JOIN offices o ON e.officeCode = o.officeCode WHERE o.city = 'San Francisco';

question: What is the total payment amount received from all customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(amount) AS totalPaymentAmount
FROM payments
ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS totalPayment FROM payments;

question: all orders that are currently shipped
generated_sql:
SELECT orderNumber, orderDate, shippedDate, status 
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'Shipped'
ground_truth_sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 'Shipped';

question: how many customers are from France
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS customersFromFrance
FROM customers
WHERE country = 'France'
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS customerCount FROM customers WHERE country = 'France';

question: who's the employee with the highest employee number
generated_sql:
SELECT employeeNumber, firstName, lastName 
FROM employees
WHERE employeeNumber = (SELECT MAX(employeeNumber) FROM employees)
ground_truth_sql: SELECT * FROM employees ORDER BY employeeNumber DESC LIMIT 1;

question: give me customers with a credit limit more than 100000
generated_sql:
SELECT customerNumber, customerName, creditLimit
FROM customers
WHERE creditLimit > 100000
ground_truth_sql: SELECT customerName, creditLimit FROM customers WHERE creditLimit > 100000;

question: what is the profit margin (MSRP minus buyPrice) for each product
generated_sql:
SELECT productCode, productName, (MSRP - buyPrice) AS profitMargin
FROM products
ground_truth_sql: SELECT productName, productCode, (MSRP - buyPrice) AS profitMargin FROM products;

question: Show all distinct productlines
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT productLine 
FROM productlines
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DISTINCT productLine FROM productlines;

question: give me number of orders for every customer
generated_sql:
SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, COUNT(o.orderNumber) AS orderCount
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber
GROUP BY c.customerNumber, c.customerName
ORDER BY orderCount DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT customerNumber, COUNT(orderNumber) AS orderCount FROM orders GROUP BY customerNumber;

question: Find all employees and their managers
generated_sql:
SELECT e.firstName AS empFirst, e.lastName AS empLast,
       m.firstName AS mgrFirst, m.lastName AS mgrLast
FROM employees e
LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.reportsTo = m.employeeNumber
ground_truth_sql: SELECT e.firstName, e.lastName, m.firstName AS managerFirstName, m.lastName AS managerLastName FROM employees e LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.reportsTo = m.employeeNumber;

question: total revenue from each order
generated_sql:
SELECT o.orderNumber, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalRevenue
FROM orders o
JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber
GROUP BY o.orderNumber
ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT orderNumber, SUM(quantityOrdered * priceEach) AS totalRevenue FROM orderdetails GROUP BY orderNumber;

question: products that have low stock less than 500 units
generated_sql:
SELECT productCode, productName, quantityInStock 
FROM products
WHERE quantityInStock < 500
ground_truth_sql: SELECT productCode, productName, quantityInStock FROM products WHERE quantityInStock < 500;

question: Show the customer name and their sales representative's name
generated_sql:
SELECT c.customerName, 
       CONCAT(e.firstName, ' ', e.lastName) AS salesRepName
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN employees e ON c.salesRepEmployeeNumber = e.employeeNumber
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customerName, e.firstName AS salesRepFirstName, e.lastName AS salesRepLastName FROM customers c LEFT JOIN employees e ON c.salesRepEmployeeNumber = e.employeeNumber;

question: give me the highest payment amount ever received
generated_sql:
SELECT MAX(amount) AS highestPayment
FROM payments
ground_truth_sql: SELECT MAX(amount) AS maxPayment FROM payments;

question: what is our territories
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT territory 
FROM offices
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DISTINCT territory FROM offices;

question: Count the number of employees in each office
generated_sql:
SELECT o.city, COUNT(e.employeeNumber) AS numEmployees
FROM offices o
JOIN employees e ON o.officeCode = e.officeCode
GROUP BY o.city
ORDER BY numEmployees DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT officeCode, COUNT(*) AS employeeCount FROM employees GROUP BY officeCode;

question: give me orders that have not been shipped yet
generated_sql:
SELECT orderNumber, orderDate, requiredDate, shippedDate, status 
FROM orders
WHERE shippedDate IS NULL
ground_truth_sql: SELECT orderNumber, orderDate, status FROM orders WHERE shippedDate IS NULL;

question: average credit limit of customers by country
generated_sql:
SELECT c.country, AVG(c.creditLimit) AS avgCreditLimit
FROM customers c
GROUP BY c.country
ORDER BY avgCreditLimit DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT country, AVG(creditLimit) AS avgCreditLimit FROM customers GROUP BY country;

question: Which products have an MSRP higher than 200
generated_sql:
SELECT productCode, productName, MSRP
FROM products
WHERE MSRP > 200

question: give me all job titles in the company

SELECT DISTINCT jobTitle

question: total quantity ordered for each product
generated_sql:
SELECT p.productCode, p.productName, SUM(od.quantityOrdered) AS totalQuantityOrdered
FROM products p
JOIN orderdetails od ON p.productCode = od.productCode
GROUP BY p.productCode, p.productName
ORDER BY totalQuantityOrdered DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT productCode, SUM(quantityOrdered) AS totalOrdered FROM orderdetails GROUP BY productCode;

question: customers who have placed more than 5 orders
generated_sql:
SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, COUNT(o.orderNumber) AS orderCount
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber
GROUP BY c.customerNumber, c.customerName
HAVING COUNT(o.orderNumber) > 5
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, COUNT(o.orderNumber) AS orderCount FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber GROUP BY c.customerNumber, c.customerName HAVING COUNT(o.orderNumber) > 5;

question: top 5 customers by total payment

SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, SUM(p.amount) AS totalPayment
FROM customers c
JOIN payments p ON c.customerNumber = p.customerNumber
GROUP BY c.customerNumber, c.customerName

question: Find the number of customers each sales representative handles

SELECT e.firstName, e.lastName, COUNT(c.customerNumber) AS numCustomers
FROM employees e
LEFT JOIN customers c ON e.employeeNumber = c.salesRepEmployeeNumber

question: total revenue by product line

question: average order value across all orders
generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(orderTotal) AS avgOrderValue
FROM (
    SELECT orderNumber, SUM(quantityOrdered * priceEach) AS orderTotal
    FROM orderdetails
    GROUP BY orderNumber
) AS orderTotals

question: show me the details of the most expensive order by total value
generated_sql:
SELECT o.orderNumber, c.customerName, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS orderTotal
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customerNumber = c.customerNumber  
JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber
GROUP BY o.orderNumber, c.customerName
ORDER BY orderTotal DESC
LIMIT 1
ground_truth_sql: SELECT o.orderNumber, o.orderDate, o.customerNumber, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalValue FROM orders o JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber GROUP BY o.orderNumber, o.orderDate, o.customerNumber ORDER BY totalValue DESC LIMIT 1;

question: products that have been ordered more than 1000 times in total
generated_sql:
SELECT p.productCode, p.productName, SUM(od.quantityOrdered) AS totalOrdered
FROM products p

question: Show me all employees working in offices outside the USA

SELECT e.firstName, e.lastName, o.city, o.country
FROM employees e
JOIN offices o ON e.officeCode = o.officeCode

question: what are the top 10 best-selling products by quantity ordered
generated_sql:
SELECT p.productCode, p.productName, SUM(od.quantityOrdered) AS totalQuantity
FROM products p
JOIN orderdetails od ON p.productCode = od.productCode
GROUP BY p.productCode, p.productName
ORDER BY totalQuantity DESC
LIMIT 10

question: all product lines with the number of products and average MSRP
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    pl.productLine, 
    COUNT(p.productCode) AS productCount,
    AVG(p.MSRP) AS avgMSRP
FROM 
    productlines pl
JOIN 
    products p ON pl.productLine = p.productLine
GROUP BY 
    pl.productLine
ground_truth_sql: SELECT productLine, COUNT(*) AS productCount, AVG(MSRP) AS avgMSRP FROM products GROUP BY productLine;

question: what's the totalof direct reports for each manager

question: Get the total revenue generated by each customer
generated_sql:
SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalRevenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber

question: what is the difference between required date and shipped date for each order
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    orderNumber,
    requiredDate,
    shippedDate,
    DATEDIFF(shippedDate, requiredDate) AS daysDifference
FROM orders
WHERE shippedDate IS NOT NULL

question: what is the number of payments per month

FROM payments

ORDER BY paymentYear, paymentMonth

question: products with the maximum quantity in stock in each product line
generated_sql:
SELECT p.productLine, p.productCode, p.productName, p.quantityInStock
FROM products p
WHERE p.quantityInStock = (
    SELECT MAX(quantityInStock) 
    FROM products
    WHERE productLine = p.productLine
)

question: give me all customers from Germany or France

question: total sales by sales representative
generated_sql:
SELECT e.firstName, e.lastName, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalSales
FROM employees e
JOIN customers c ON e.employeeNumber = c.salesRepEmployeeNumber
JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber
JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber
GROUP BY e.employeeNumber, e.firstName, e.lastName
ORDER BY totalSales DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT e.employeeNumber, e.firstName, e.lastName, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalSales FROM employees e JOIN customers c ON e.employeeNumber = c.salesRepEmployeeNumber JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber GROUP BY e.employeeNumber, e.firstName, e.lastName ORDER BY totalSales DESC;

FROM customers c
WHERE c.city = 'New York'
ground_truth_sql: SELECT customerName, contactFirstName, contactLastName, phone, addressLine1, city FROM customers WHERE city = 'New York';

question: the product that has  the highest MSRP
generated_sql:
SELECT productCode, productName, MSRP
FROM products
ORDER BY MSRP DESC
LIMIT 1
ground_truth_sql: SELECT productCode, productName, MSRP FROM products ORDER BY MSRP DESC LIMIT 1;

question: give me the employees their last name starts with 'P'
generated_sql:
SELECT employeeNumber, firstName, lastName 
FROM employees
WHERE lastName LIKE 'P%'
ground_truth_sql: SELECT employeeNumber, firstName, lastName, email FROM employees WHERE lastName LIKE 'P%';

question: the revenue trend overtime
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    YEAR(o.orderDate) AS year,
    MONTH(o.orderDate) AS month,
    SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber
GROUP BY YEAR(o.orderDate), MONTH(o.orderDate)
ORDER BY year, month
ground_truth_sql: SELECT YEAR(o.orderDate) AS year, MONTH(o.orderDate) AS month, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS monthlyRevenue FROM orders o JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber GROUP BY YEAR(o.orderDate), MONTH(o.orderDate) ORDER BY year, month;

question: orders with total valu more than 10000
generated_sql:
SELECT o.orderNumber, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS orderTotal
FROM orders o
JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber
GROUP BY o.orderNumber
HAVING SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) > 10000
ground_truth_sql: SELECT orderNumber, SUM(quantityOrdered * priceEach) AS totalValue FROM orderdetails GROUP BY orderNumber HAVING SUM(quantityOrdered * priceEach) > 10000;

question: which offices in the EMEA
generated_sql:
SELECT officeCode, city, country 
FROM offices
WHERE country IN ('France', 'Germany', 'UK', 'Italy', 'Spain')
ground_truth_sql: SELECT officeCode, city, country FROM offices WHERE territory = 'EMEA';

question: all products in the Classic Cars category
generated_sql:
SELECT productCode, productName 
FROM products
WHERE productLine = 'Classic Cars'
ground_truth_sql: SELECT productCode, productName, buyPrice, MSRP FROM products WHERE productLine = 'Classic Cars';

question: groupe customers into tier based on thier credit limit
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customerNumber,
    customerName,
    CASE
        WHEN creditLimit < 10000 THEN 'Tier 1'
        WHEN creditLimit BETWEEN 10000 AND 50000 THEN 'Tier 2'
        ELSE 'Tier 3'
    END AS creditTier
FROM customers
ground_truth_sql: SELECT customerNumber, customerName, creditLimit, CASE WHEN creditLimit < 25000 THEN 'Low' WHEN creditLimit BETWEEN 25000 AND 75000 THEN 'Medium' WHEN creditLimit > 75000 THEN 'High' END AS creditTier FROM customers;

question: how many orders did each customer make and their name
generated_sql:
SELECT c.customerName, COUNT(o.orderNumber) AS orderCount
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber
GROUP BY c.customerName
ORDER BY orderCount DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, COUNT(o.orderNumber) AS orderCount FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber GROUP BY c.customerNumber, c.customerName;

question: whats the avrage quantity ordered per order line
generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(quantityOrdered) AS avgQuantityPerOrderLine
FROM orderdetails
ground_truth_sql: SELECT AVG(quantityOrdered) AS avgQuantityPerLine FROM orderdetails;

question: all the employees who are Sales Managers
generated_sql:
SELECT employeeNumber, firstName, lastName, jobTitle 
FROM employees
WHERE jobTitle = 'Sales Manager'
ground_truth_sql: SELECT employeeNumber, firstName, lastName, email, officeCode FROM employees WHERE jobTitle LIKE '%Sales Manager%';

question: product code, name, and price for products priced above the average
generated_sql:
SELECT productCode, productName, MSRP
FROM products
WHERE MSRP > (SELECT AVG(MSRP) FROM products)
ground_truth_sql: SELECT productCode, productName, buyPrice FROM products WHERE buyPrice > (SELECT AVG(buyPrice) FROM products);

question: tell me total credit limit for all customers
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(creditLimit) AS totalCreditLimit
FROM customers
ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(creditLimit) AS totalCreditLimit FROM customers;

question: which orders are still in process
generated_sql:
SELECT orderNumber, orderDate, status 
FROM orders
WHERE status IN ('In Process', 'On Hold')
ground_truth_sql: SELECT orderNumber, orderDate, customerNumber FROM orders WHERE status = 'In Process';

question: how much each country made
generated_sql:
SELECT c.country, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalRevenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber
JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber
GROUP BY c.country
ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.country, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalRevenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC;

question: how many offices are there in each country
generated_sql:
SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS officeCount
FROM offices
GROUP BY country
ORDER BY officeCount DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS officeCount FROM offices GROUP BY country;

question: i wanna see the levels of employees that report to a manager
generated_sql:
SELECT e.firstName AS empFirst, e.lastName AS empLast, 
       m.firstName AS mgrFirst, m.lastName AS mgrLast
FROM employees e
LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.reportsTo = m.employeeNumber
ORDER BY m.lastName, m.firstName, e.lastName, e.firstName
ground_truth_sql: SELECT e.employeeNumber, CONCAT(e.firstName, ' ', e.lastName) AS employeeName, e.jobTitle, m.employeeNumber AS managerNumber, CONCAT(m.firstName, ' ', m.lastName) AS managerName FROM employees e JOIN employees m ON e.reportsTo = m.employeeNumber;

question: customers with over 3 paymets
generated_sql:
SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, COUNT(p.checkNumber) AS paymentCount
FROM customers c
JOIN payments p ON c.customerNumber = p.customerNumber
GROUP BY c.customerNumber, c.customerName
HAVING COUNT(p.checkNumber) > 3
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, COUNT(p.checkNumber) AS paymentCount FROM customers c JOIN payments p ON c.customerNumber = p.customerNumber GROUP BY c.customerNumber, c.customerName HAVING COUNT(p.checkNumber) > 3;

question: give me the total stock value for each vendor
generated_sql:
SELECT p.productVendor, SUM(p.quantityInStock * p.buyPrice) AS totalStockValue
FROM products p
GROUP BY p.productVendor
ORDER BY totalStockValue DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT productVendor, SUM(quantityInStock * buyPrice) AS totalStockValue FROM products GROUP BY productVendor ORDER BY totalStockValue DESC;

question: what is the second highest payment we got
generated_sql:
SELECT checkNumber, customerNumber, amount
FROM payments
ORDER BY amount DESC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DISTINCT amount FROM payments ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1;
